tasks.subject: UC-T1: UrlConsolidator injected-client constructor + ownsClient guards + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** UrlConsolidator accepts RedisClientType | string; injected path makes connect/disconnect no-ops via an ownsClient guard (mandatory — else cleanup closes the shared client); string path keeps legacy create-and-own. cleanup/fullCleanup/isInDataset/consolidate/ensureTtl/loadRequestQueueUrls bodies unchanged. Create UrlConsolidator.test.ts: injected no-op lifecycle, cleanup dels rq+ru and KEEPS dataset + no disconnect, fullCleanup dels all three + no disconnect, isInDataset->sIsMember delegation, error-path (reject->false), legacy construct.

**Files:** src/class/UrlConsolidator.ts, src/class/UrlConsolidator.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/UrlConsolidator.ts", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/UrlConsolidator.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm run build && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ctor accepts RedisClientType | string", "connect/disconnect guarded by ownsClient", "cleanup dels rq+ru keeps dataset no disconnect", "fullCleanup dels all three no disconnect", "isInDataset->sIsMember delegation", "error-path reject->false", "legacy construct-without-connect", "existing 157 tests stay green"]}
```

tasks.subject: UC-T2: wire sharedRedis into UrlConsolidator at main.ts:688 + drop dead redisUrl
tasks.description:
**Goal:** main.ts:688 constructs new UrlConsolidator(sharedRedis, id, previousCrawlId, domain). If tsc flags the local const redisUrl (main.ts:687) as unused, remove that line; else leave it. tsc clean, no other line changes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["main.ts:688 passes sharedRedis", "dead local redisUrl removed only if tsc flags unused", "tsc 0 errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: UC-T3: crawler-service CLAUDE.md docs (replace UrlConsolidator deferred caveat)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the '(Remaining separate client: UrlConsolidator still opens its own Redis connection — deferred.)' caveat (CLAUDE.md ~line 384, added by the StatsManager work) with text stating UrlConsolidator now also consumes the injected shared client (update mode, ownsClient=false), no separate per-crawl client remains, spec link.
